# Copilot instructions

Read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) before making changes. This monorepo contains curriculum markdown and a Next.js cohort platform in `execution/marketing/site/`.

- Never commit Firebase service account keys or `.env.local`
- Platform voting uses private thumbs up/down after written GitHub reviews (not ranked-choice)
- Run `npm run build` in `execution/marketing/site/` for site changes
- Program participant copy lives in `execution/marketing/site/content/program.ts`
